name: apexvip-functions
description: ApexVIP Cloud Functions — TypeScript (getHotelRates, Square/Stripe payments, ApexAI, dispatch, compliance).

scripts.test:emulator: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,functions --project demo-apexvip "node test/dispatch.emulator.mjs"
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions:apexvip
